name: swarm-flow
description: AI-native software delivery engine for governed, artifact-driven SDLC flows.

scripts.build: tsc -b packages/core packages/connectors packages/runtime packages/adapters packages/qa packages/sdk packages/cli
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b packages/core packages/connectors packages/runtime packages/adapters packages/qa packages/sdk packages/cli --pretty false
scripts.verify: npm test && npm run typecheck && npm run build
